title: Forge Carpet
description: Ported all features of fabric-carpet to forge
body:
Carpet Mod is a mod for vanilla Minecraft that allows you to take full control of what matters from a technical perspective of the game.

The mod `Fabric Carpet` is so easy to use !

But it's a fabric mod, there is no corresponding forge version.

So I am going to port this mod to forge.

All features have been migrated.

<u>But his compatibility is terrible.</u>
